title: Effect of 1,10-phenanthroline on the graft polymerization of vinyl monomers onto guar gum in presence of Fenton's reagent
author: P. Chowdhury
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Siksha-Bhavana, Visva-Bharati, Santiniketan-731 235, West Bengal, India 

 Department of Chemistry, National Institute of Technology, Durgapur-713 209, West Bengal, India 

 Manuscript received 22 March 2006, revised 21 August 2006, accepted 23 October 2006 

 The effect and role of 1,10-phenanthroline and  ortho  phosphoric acid on graft polymerization of vinyl monomers onto guar gum in presence of Fenton's reagent have been studied. Reaction conditions were optimized. FTIR spectra were used for confirmation of grafting. A probable mechanism of grafting to elucidate the role of phenanthroline and phosphoric has been suggested. Thermal properties of the grafted polymer were studied.
